Packet Buffer Reference
Table Summary Microbursts Trident+ Trident II Deep Buffer

Accton 5652

The Accton 5652 is a white-box switch built on the Broadcom Trident+ (BCM56840) ASIC.

Field Value
Ports 48 SFP+ and 4 QSFP
RX Queues 8Q
Total Buffer 9 MB
TX Buffer (max to 1 port) ~5 MB (estimated)

See the Trident+ architecture page for details on how the 9 MB shared buffer pool works.

References

  • Accton 5652 Administrator's Guide

← Back to the main buffer table

Source: Jim Warner, UCSC (archived 2014). Information is by rumor, innuendo, and extrapolation. Manufacturers rarely publish packet buffer data in their data sheets.
